roles.core: central bot, finance, licenses, PasarGuard integration, Plisio invoice fast path and D1 authority
roles.edge: web panels, reseller bots, customer miniapps and fast reseller Plisio invoice creation
roles.processor: report retries, topic repair, daily reports, backups and background jobs

features: use a valid cached USD-to-toman rate immediately while refreshing an old rate in the background
fall back to the configured manual rate without blocking invoice creation on the FX provider
cache decrypted central and reseller Plisio secrets for a short period inside each Worker isolate
move non-critical Plisio status writes, audits and reseller sales events behind waitUntil
avoid invalidating the complete central settings cache after every Plisio invoice status heartbeat
remove an extra settings lookup from Telegram reseller invoice creation
add a bounded timeout for Plisio API calls and retain idempotent return_existing behavior
preserve callback verification, one-time wallet crediting, report topics and PasarGuard 5.1 support

validation.javascript_syntax: passed for core, edge and processor
validation.critical_invoice_storage: static assertion: local invoice is still stored before returning the payment link
validation.fx_safety: cached rate is used only inside max-stale window; otherwise manual fallback or synchronous refresh is required
validation.live_plisio_latency: not run; no live Plisio secret was supplied
